summary: Extended location details and reviews feature testing - All backend tests passed (11/11). All frontend features working correctly. Location cards show ratings, detail pages display all extended fields (service_tags, price_level, description, images), review system fully functional (create, list, admin delete), rating aggregation working.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeded 16 locations with extended data (service_tags, price_level). Multiple test reviews created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extended location details feature fully functional. Reviews system working without authentication. Admin can delete reviews with auth. Rating aggregation updates avg_rating and review_count correctly. Frontend displays all extended fields beautifully on both main page cards and detail pages.

backend_tests_passed: GET /api/locations returns locations with service_tags, price_level, avg_rating, review_count fields
GET /api/locations/{id} returns full location detail with all extended fields
POST /api/locations/{id}/reviews creates review without auth (public endpoint)
POST /api/locations/{id}/reviews validates stars (1-5 only, returns 422 for invalid)
Creating review updates location's avg_rating and review_count (aggregation working)
DELETE /api/admin/reviews/{id} with admin auth deletes review successfully
Deleting review recalculates avg_rating and review_count correctly
frontend_tests_passed: Main page loads with 16 location cards
Location cards display rating stars and numbers (e.g., ⭐ 5.0, ⭐ 4.0)
Clicking location card navigates to /location/{id} detail page
Detail page shows location name with proper styling
Detail page displays star rating with avg_rating and review_count (e.g., 5.0 (3 recenzija))
Detail page shows price level badge (€, €€, €€€)
Detail page displays service tags as chips (e.g., Bosanska kuhinja, Ćevapi, Pire)
Detail page shows address, working hours, phone with icons
Detail page displays description section ('O lokaciji')
Detail page has 'Ostavi ocjenu' button in reviews section
Clicking 'Ostavi ocjenu' opens review modal
Review modal has star rating picker (1-5 stars, interactive)
Review modal has name input field (required)
Review modal has comment textarea (optional)
Review modal has 'Pošalji recenziju' submit button
Submitting review closes modal and refreshes data
New review appears in reviews list immediately
Review cards show avatar with first letter, author name, date, stars, comment
Back button navigates from detail page to main page
Multiple location detail pages work correctly with different data

extended_location_fields.service_tags: ✓ Working - displayed as chips on detail page
extended_location_fields.avg_rating: ✓ Working - calculated from reviews, displayed with stars
extended_location_fields.images: ✓ Working - array field present (admin can upload)

review_system.create_review_no_auth: ✓ Working - public endpoint, no login required
review_system.review_validation: ✓ Working - stars must be 1-5, name required, comment optional
review_system.rating_aggregation: ✓ Working - avg_rating and review_count update automatically

frontend_ui.main_page_ratings: ✓ Working - cards show star icon and rating number
frontend_ui.detail_page_layout: ✓ Working - clean mobile-first design with all fields
frontend_ui.review_modal: ✓ Working - smooth modal with star picker, inputs, submit
frontend_ui.navigation: ✓ Working - card click → detail, back button → main

screenshots: /tmp/03_detail_page_scrolled.png - Detail page showing all extended fields
/tmp/04_review_modal.png - Review modal with star picker and inputs
/tmp/05_review_form_filled.png - Review form filled with test data
/tmp/09_second_location_detail.png - Second location (Restoran Zmaj) with different rating
/tmp/main_page_cards.png - Close-up of location cards with visible ratings

backend.extended_fields_in_model: ✓ Location model has service_tags, price_level, avg_rating, review_count, images
backend.review_model: ✓ Review model with author_name, stars (1-5), comment (optional), created_at
backend.rating_aggregation_function: ✓ recalc_rating() uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline correctly
backend.public_review_endpoints: ✓ POST and GET reviews are public (no auth required)

frontend.location_interface: ✓ LocationItem interface includes avg_rating, review_count, service_tags, price_level
frontend.detail_page_components: ✓ StarRating component, InfoRow component, review cards
frontend.review_modal: ✓ Modal with KeyboardAvoidingView, star picker, form inputs
frontend.testid_attributes: ✓ All interactive elements have testID for testing

performance_notes.frontend_load_time: Main page loads in ~2-3 seconds with 16 locations
performance_notes.review_submission: Review submission and rating update completes in ~1-2 seconds
